• Interactive Magic 8 Ball with 3D WebGL particle effects via Three.js
  • Generates AI answers using OpenRouter API with selectable personality styles
  • Features shake animations, question input, and responsive Tailwind CSS styling
    const MODEL = "google/gemma-3n-e2b-it:free";
    displayInsideBall(replyText);

This interactive web application simulates a classic Magic 8 Ball with dynamic visual effects. Users can input questions, choose answer personality styles, and receive AI-generated responses. It uses Three.js for 3D backgrounds, Tailwind CSS for styling, and the OpenRouter API for answer generation.
